svg.text: Deterministic Match → No Match (New BA) → Possible Match (Exception Queue) | Snowflake-native HITL feedback at every stage
on TIN — must also match Name
Goal: Accelerate Step 1 with structured HITL so deterministic matches are resolved quickly and confidently
Goal: Accelerate new BA creation with structured HITL — resolve quickly and confidently
Only Step 3 + flagged exceptions require full HITL review — eliminates multiple UAT cycles
• Cleanup rules in governed rules table
4. Continuous Learning Model — Every HITL Decision Improves the System
✓ Build confidence in the matching process
✓ Create reusable logic across all customers
⚠ Missing Component Today: A structured feedback mechanism across all three steps — currently relies on Excel back-and-forth
